retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional and do not have a failure path; retrying after a successful put would cause a double-put (use-after-free).
contract_summary: This function is a cleanup helper that releases all references stored in the xarray of amdgpu_userq_fence_driver objects. It iterates over every entry, erases it from the xarray, and drops one reference (kref_put) on each object. After this function returns, the xarray is empty and all associated objects have had their reference count decremented appropriately. The caller must not access the xarray contents afterward; this is typically called during destruction or teardown of the user queue fence driver context.
